title: Incorporating AI assistant into the Creative Request form
excerpt: So we noticed that there is now a template form for creative requests. A game changer for us as a creative agency would be to add the AI assistant to that form so that briefers could write a brief quicker with writing as…

posts.author: Nitzan_Regev (Nitzan Regev-Sanders)
posts.cookedHtml: So we noticed that there is now a template form for creative requests. A game changer for us as a creative agency would be to add the AI assistant to that form so that briefers could write a brief quicker with writing assistant, summarise long text and even record messages and turn them into text in the different fields. We’ve looked everywhere - no one is offering this service yet. So you’d get to be the first and you’d save creatives and content managers SO much time!
